fingerprints.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

seo.title: Wyoming Pharmacist License Reciprocity - How to Transfer Your License (2026)
seo.description: Already licensed as a pharmacist? Here's whether your license transfers to Wyoming - compact status, endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.
seo.keywords: pharmacist license reciprocity wyoming, how to transfer pharmacist license to wyoming, pharmacist compact wyoming, wyoming pharmacist endorsement application

license_types.title: RPh, PharmD
license_types.description: The standard credential to practice as a pharmacist in Wyoming.

steps.title: Create a WYPL Account
steps.description: Navigate to the Wyoming Professional Licensing System (WYPL) at https://wypl.force.com/ and select 'Register Here' to establish a new user account by providing personal details and setting up login credentials.

steps.title: Initiate Online Application
steps.description: Log in to your newly created WYPL account and select the appropriate option to start a new Pharmacist License application (either by Examination or by Endorsement).

steps.title: Complete Application and Submit Documents
steps.description: Fill out all required sections of the online application, including personal information, education, examination details (NAPLEX/MPJE results), and upload necessary supporting documents such as official transcripts and proof of practical experience, within the WYPL system.

steps.title: Pay Application Fee
steps.description: Electronically submit the non-refundable application fee within the Wyoming Professional Licensing System to finalize your application submission.

steps.title: Undergo Criminal Background Check
steps.description: Follow the specific instructions provided within the application or by the Board to complete the required fingerprint-based criminal background check through the designated vendor.

steps.title: Board Review and Licensure
steps.description: Await the Wyoming State Board of Pharmacy's review of your complete application and all supporting materials. Once approved, your pharmacist license will be issued.

documents.detail: Sent directly from your educational institution.
Official verification of passing the NAPLEX and MPJE.

provisional_text: Some states offer an intern or provisional license for graduates actively accumulating required hours or waiting to take the NAPLEX.
reciprocity_text: Pharmacists licensed in another state can often apply via license transfer (reciprocity) through the NABP, though most states still require passing their specific MPJE.

faqs.question: How much does a Wyoming pharmacist license cost?
faqs.answer: The initial application and licensing fee varies by state. Check the specific fee breakdown above.

faqs.question: Is the MPJE required in all states?
faqs.answer: Almost all states require passing their state-specific Multistate Pharmacy Jurisprudence Examination (MPJE) to verify knowledge of local pharmacy laws.

faqs.question: Does Wyoming have reciprocity for pharmacists?
faqs.answer: No interstate compact currently covers pharmacist practice in Wyoming. To work in Wyoming, apply for licensure by endorsement through the state board.

faqs.question: How long does it take to transfer my pharmacist license to Wyoming?
faqs.answer: Most endorsement applications take 4 to 6 Weeks.

faqs.question: Can I start working in Wyoming while my endorsement application is processing?
faqs.answer: A temporary or provisional credential is available while the full endorsement application is pending.

reciprocity.notes: Pharmacists licensed in another state can often apply via license transfer (reciprocity) through the NABP, though most states still require passing their specific MPJE.

hero.title: Become a Pharmacist in Wyoming
hero.dek: To apply for a pharmacist license in Wyoming, you must create an account and submit your application through the Wyoming Professional Licensing System (WYPL).

variants.label: New Applicant

variants.label: Reciprocity

official_links.registration_steps: Visit https://wypl.force.com/ and click the 'Register Here' link to create a new user account by providing personal details, contact information, and setting up a unique username and password.
